title: Pod image build hardening: node-import smoke test + constraints torch pin
description: Two Dockerfile edits adopted from YanWenKun/ComfyUI-Docker (reviewed 2026-07-23). (1) Add `RUN python /opt/ComfyUI/main.py --quick-test-for-ci --cpu` after the node bake so a custom node that fails to IMPORT fails the BUILD instead of a live Pod gen - this is exactly the MPI-149 class of bug (kornia 0.8.3 removed the `pad` re-export, LTXVideo failed to load, shipped, died live as `Node Stage1_Bypass not found`), and it replaces the hand-run `8 nodes register` gate from the MPI-139 plan. (2) Generate a pip constraints file pinning the cu130 torch trio right after the torch install and pass `-c` to every later pip call, making torch drift UNRESOLVABLE rather than merely asserted after the fact (the MPI-244 guard becomes the belt, not the only line). Build on the MPI-340 dev tag - do NOT rebuild the released v0.16.0. Detail in brief.md.
